creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

Author: bsam
Date: Sun Sep 23 13:54:24 2012
New Revision: 304740
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304740

Log:
  . update to version 2.4.1;  [1]
  . adopt new style headers.
  
  PR:		ports/171751  [1]
  Submitted by:	bsam (me)  [1]
  Approved by:	Matthias Petermann <matthias@d2ux.net> (maintainer)  [1]

Modified:
  head/finance/tryton/Makefile
  head/finance/tryton/distinfo
  head/finance/tryton/pkg-plist

Modified: head/finance/tryton/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/tryton/Makefile	Sun Sep 23 13:04:50 2012	(r304739)
+++ head/finance/tryton/Makefile	Sun Sep 23 13:54:24 2012	(r304740)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	tryton
-# Date created:				12 August, 2012
-# Whom:					Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
-#
+# Created by: Matthias Petermann <matthias@petermann.it>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	tryton
-PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.1
 CATEGORIES=	finance python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/2.4/
